faqs.question: What deal options are available for the Solo or Couples Deep-Tissue or Swedish Massage with Hot Stones & More at Pure Serenity Spa?
faqs.answer: Pure Serenity Spa offers two options: a solo 60-minute Deep-Tissue or Swedish Massage with free hot stones and pure massage oil, or a Couples 60-Minute Deep-Tissue or Swedish Massage with the same inclusions. Both options allow guests to choose between deep-tissue and Swedish massage styles.

faqs.question: Where is Pure Serenity Spa located in Chicago, IL?
faqs.answer: Pure Serenity Spa is located in the Lincoln Park neighborhood of Chicago, IL, at 1136 West Armitage Avenue, Chicago, IL 60614.

faqs.question: How long does each massage session last at Pure Serenity Spa?
faqs.answer: Each session — whether solo or couples — is 60 minutes in duration, as specified in the deal options for both the deep-tissue and Swedish massage choices.

faqs.question: What is the difference between the deep-tissue and Swedish massage options offered in this deal?
faqs.answer: Both the deep-tissue and Swedish massage options are available as part of the Solo or Couples Deep-Tissue or Swedish Massage with Hot Stones & More at Pure Serenity Spa. Deep-tissue and Swedish massage are recognized as distinct massage modalities, both offered at the 60-minute duration with hot stones and pure massage oil included.

reviews.text: Excellent service! Felt so relaxed and can’t wait to return.
reviews.author: Luis

reviews.text: I wasn't sure what to expect but I was pleasantly surprised.  The massage was great. Better than some other pricey places I've been to. Easy to get to and plenty of street parking. Very nice area to walk after massage Read More
reviews.author: Guest

reviews.text: Wonderful massage; will definitely return and make it a consistent element of my healthy lifestyle.
reviews.author: Mia

reviews.text: I go monthly here and have a great experience every time. All staff is very good! They have two locations now right across the street from eachother.
reviews.author: Jenna

reviews.text: Very affordable and in a great area!
reviews.author: Sydney
